column1: C[amybot-beginner: I'm a beginner bot, playing 30k-20k games. Suggest a handicap in the game request if it's too hard or too easy. Good luck, have fun!
amybot-beginner: Thank you for the game! If I did something annoying or glitchy - let me know in this chat, in the site chat or by chatting to my administrator. We'll get it sorted.
C[pathogenix: Are you the wombat from /r/baduk?
wombat: Very impressed with the Nova site so far, I must say.
C[pathogenix: I'm wondering if I can construct a whole-board seki in the shape of the reddit alien :D
wombat: Very pretty. I looked at DGS a while ago - functional enough but this is very slick in comparison
wombat: Oh, a reddit alien seki would be VERY impressive :)
C[pathogenix: I like that this works either real-time or turn based, so we can play for a while over lunch and then go our separate ways and make moves whenever,,, it's a great idea
wombat: Definitely. I have a crazy schedule so it definitely works for me!
C[pathogenix: What do you, to make your schedule so crazy?
C[wombat: Journalist and father of infant twins :)
pathogenix: :) That'll do it - how old?
wombat: 13 months. Wouldn't trade my boys for anything, but it's complete chaos.
C[wombat: No, though people often ask me if they are - very similar if you don't know them. And completely different personalities
wombat: (as much as a 13 month-old can have a personality :)
pathogenix: 13 month olds definitely have a personality
pathogenix: Yeah, I've got an eight year old and a two year old, both boys
C[wombat: The game or the boys? :)
